TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == nilaculan == mubahelay i tay-kung Ś§™Á©ļť£õŤ°Ć sapibahel i tay-kung "kamu nu Ing, spacecraft", singangan aca tu sapicuu' nu taykung, atu balunga nu taykung, mubahelay balunga' nu taykung. u i likutay a bali nu ticiway a laed nu kakalayan, miduduc tu icelang nu kakalayan a misaungay ku canacan a sapibahel. sapibahel i tay-kung atu kakalayanay u cayay kalecad itini kapah kuwanen misumad ku saculil a zazan aca miala'. hinamaazihayay tu a sapibahel i tay-kung pasu nisanga'an nu tdemaw a wiy-sin, sapiazih nu taykung, tay-kung-sow atu cacanan a tay-kung-tcan. sapibahel nu tay-kung amileku tu zumaay a kawaw kanca aizaw ku sapiacingan, sapiculu', miditekay nu hikukiay, misupedan tu nisulitan, u kitizaan nu micukaymasay atu patatungus tu nisanga'n tu nialaan. anu maydih mitupin tu tademaw, asangaleb sinikelid tu sakataneknek nu uzip, sakakapah nu uzip, miazih ku tademaw tu miecaway a miedap tu zunbay nu miecaway. V2 silamalay acin tungusay u saayaway nu kitakitay sapibahel nu tay-kung. sapibahel i tay-kung duduc tanengay mitupin tu tademaw hakya pasazumaed sapibahel nu tay-kung atu mitupinay tu tademaw a sapibaheli I tay-kung, miculu'ay tu tademaw mubahel tayza i kakalayanan a sakacaw pangangan han tu "mitupinay tu tademaw a sapibahel nu tay-kung". mitupinay tu tademaw a sapibahel i tay-kung a yadah ku masazumaay a nisanga'an tu sapipazeng tu tuudan, ayaw amidiput tu kikayaw a tademaw atu balunga, amidungdunng tu akuti' atu kalat cilal nu kakalayan, atadeng mitena' tu bali ku balunga, akuti' cudet atu u huyakuy. mikawaway tu kikayay a tademaw atu mauzip i balunnga a silaed tu kakalayan, labu nu balung amisanga' tu sapawapen tu bali a sapihanhan. micumud tu kakalayan i likut nu hikuki mikawaw ayaw aizaw ku pabalian mala ku sakalaawan. nayay a tademaw a sapibahel i tay-kung duduc hakay misaliyuk tu ti-ciw malineng pala u nisanga' nu tademaw a wi-sin, atu sadiditek nu tay-kung. kilul tu sapibahel nu tay-kung u sapicukaymas atu nisanga'an, taneng henay atalaayaw mihapinang pasazuma tuhenian. sapibahel taneng amiliyas tu lala' lalid mubahelay a kikay, pasu i ti-ciw a labu nu bali mumahelay a sapibahel a hikuki "mahiniay u bali a mali, mubahelay abalunga, ce-sen-ci, hikukian amin", i hekalay a bali mubahelay a sapibahel i tay-kung "mahiniay nisanga'an nu tadedmaw a wi-sin, tay-kung-sow, mitupinay tu tademaw taykung balinga, taykung-can" atu canacanan nu silamalay acin atu mubahelay a lacu. i Zipun atu Caw-sin-pan-taw "sapibahel" a hikuki, sapibahel nu tay-kung pangangan ahan "sapibahel nu kakalayan". imahini u ti-ciw cilalay u cilal ku angangan maka labu hekalay nu sakatulu nu mucililay a bunac, u lecad laed nu cilal 149,597,870 kung-li "tungusay tu cacay a demiad", imahini kakalayanay matineng tu uiyni cacay dada' nu mauzipay nu kakalayan. ti-ciw a tuud pakal tu 5.97√ó1024 a daduy pangkiw nu mulu pakala tu 6,371 kung-li, u lecad nu kazeket 5.5g/cm3, u satalakaway a cilalan bucacan. namahini ti-ciw u lineng atu malineng, pasasizuma tu demiad labii atu sepat a puu' makatutay masumasumad, cacay a demiad maniyul ku cilal tu cacay a lipay, cacay a mihcaan maniyul tu cacay a lipay ku cilal, hekal a nikalineng pangangan han tu hekal teleklal, hekal a kalineng pangangan han tu kalawlaway hekal a zazan, tusa a kakacayat zayhan matikenih ku niyul maemic ku kalimucu' pangangan han tu kalawlaway teleklan, ti-ciway uyza dada' ku tatenga'ay a imian, matucek nu salenu a wiy-sin-ye-ciw, zuma iza henay ku pituay matineng tu milakuit tu adidi'ay nu muculilay a bunac zayhan cacay a pilipayan ku kaniyul masulecaday tu ti-ciw satu mapala wiyd-sin han. icelang nu kakalayan nu tin-wen-sye a kasaciit, micalap tu icelang nu kakalayan a masaungay atu mililid, micukaymas tu kaga, micudekay sa u niw-tun-li-sye, migingkiway tu kakalayanay icelang a undu atu kasahiza. u sagingkiwan sa labuay nu cilal a kakalayan atu cayay kakatuuday a tademaw a hen-sinan. u niw-tun, la-ke-lang-ze atu pabalungaay a sakakawawan malingatu tu macakat, sitatengil a sinaikesan tu ku nigingkiway a masakapahay tu malepun. icelang nu kakalayan palaenemen ku mahiniay , u se-tung-li-lun, nipiasip, tin-sin-li-lun, tin-wen-sya, tin-ti atu niyul li-lun, kayadah nu munday "lalabu izaw ku tusa a bunday". tin-ti-li-sye mikitadu tu nisulitan tu kuyumin nu kakalayan, 1846 a mihcaan-li-lun maazih ku hsy-wang-sin u tungusay nu tin-ti-li-sye palahaday a bacu'. Tin-ti-li-sye u kahemekan a nalekuan sa uyza palahad tut ay-kung-ting-li-sye, migingkuy atu palahad patahkal tu canacanan nu tademaway a nisanga'an a zazan nu wi-sin. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan == mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj i taj-kuŇč **** sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ i taj-kuŇč "kamu nu iŇč, spa ¶…ô ¶raft", siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu sapi ¶uu Ē~ ° nu tajkuŇč, atu bar~…ĺuŇča nu tajkuŇč, mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° nu tajkuŇč. u i r~…ĺikutaj a bar~…ĺi nu ti ¶iwaj a r~…ĺa…ôd nu kakar~…ĺajan, midudu ¶ tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu kakar~…ĺajan a misauŇčaj ku ¶ana ¶an a sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ. sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ i taj-kuŇč atu kakar~…ĺajanaj u ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad itini kapańß kuwan…ôn misumad ku sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a zazan a ¶a miar~…ĺa Ē~ °. ńßinamaazińßajaj tu a sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ i taj-kuŇč pasu nisaŇča Ē~ °an nu td…ômaw a wij-sin, sapiazińß nu tajkuŇč, taj-kuŇč-sow atu ¶a ¶anan a taj-kuŇč-t ¶an. sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ nu taj-kuŇč amir~…ĺ…ôku tu zumaaj a kawaw kan ¶a aizaw ku sapia ¶iŇčan, sapi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °, midit…ôkaj nu ńßikukiaj, misup…ôdan tu nisur~…ĺitan, u kitizaan nu mi ¶ukajmasaj atu patatuŇčus tu nisaŇča Ē~ °n tu niar~…ĺaan. anu majdińß mitupin tu tad…ômaw, asaŇčar~…ĺ…ôb sinik…ôr~…ĺid tu sakatan…ôkn…ôk nu uzip, sakakapańß nu uzip, miazińß ku tad…ômaw tu mi…ô ¶awaj a mi…ôdap tu zunbaj nu mi…ô ¶awaj. ** sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a ¶in tuŇčusaj u saajawaj nu kitakitaj sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ nu taj-kuŇč. sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ i taj-kuŇč dudu ¶ tan…ôŇčaj mitupin tu tad…ômaw ńßakja pasazuma…ôd sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ nu taj-kuŇč atu mitupinaj tu tad…ômaw a sapibańß…ôr~…ĺi i taj-kuŇč, mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj tu tad…ômaw mubańß…ôr~…ĺ tajza i kakar~…ĺajanan a saka ¶aw paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "mitupinaj tu tad…ômaw a sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ nu taj-kuŇč". mitupinaj tu tad…ômaw a sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ i taj-kuŇč a jadańß ku masazumaaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu sapipaz…ôŇč tu tuudan, ajaw amidiput tu kikajaw a tad…ômaw atu bar~…ĺuŇča, amiduŇčdunŇč tu akuti Ē~ ° atu kar~…ĺat ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ nu kakar~…ĺajan, atad…ôŇč mit…ôna Ē~ ° tu bar~…ĺi ku bar~…ĺuŇča, akuti Ē~ ° ¶ud…ôt atu u ńßujakuj. mikawawaj tu kikajaj a tad…ômaw atu mauzip i bar~…ĺunŇča a sir~…ĺa…ôd tu kakar~…ĺajan, r~…ĺabu nu bar~…ĺuŇč amisaŇča Ē~ ° tu sapawap…ôn tu bar~…ĺi a sapińßanńßan. mi ¶umud tu kakar~…ĺajan i r~…ĺikut nu ńßikuki mikawaw ajaw aizaw ku pabar~…ĺian mar~…ĺa ku sakar~…ĺaawan. najaj a tad…ômaw a sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ i taj-kuŇč dudu ¶ ńßakaj misar~…ĺijuk tu ti- ¶iw mar~…ĺin…ôŇč par~…ĺa u nisaŇča Ē~ ° nu tad…ômaw a wi-sin, atu sadidit…ôk nu taj-kuŇč. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ nu taj-kuŇč u sapi ¶ukajmas atu nisaŇča Ē~ °an, tan…ôŇč ńß…ônaj atar~…ĺaajaw mińßapinaŇč pasazuma tuńß…ônian. sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ tan…ôŇč amir~…ĺijas tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° r~…ĺar~…ĺid mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj a kikaj, pasu i ti- ¶iw a r~…ĺabu nu bar~…ĺi mumańß…ôr~…ĺaj a sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ a ńßikuki "mańßiniaj u bar~…ĺi a mar~…ĺi, mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj abar~…ĺuŇča, ¶…ô-s…ôn- ¶i, ńßikukian amin", i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a bar~…ĺi mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj a sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ i taj-kuŇč "mańßiniaj nisaŇča Ē~ °an nu tad…ôdmaw a wi-sin, taj-kuŇč-sow, mitupinaj tu tad…ômaw tajkuŇč bar~…ĺiŇča, tajkuŇč- ¶an" atu ¶ana ¶anan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a ¶in atu mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj a r~…ĺa ¶u. i zipun atu ¶aw-sin-pan-taw "sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ" a ńßikuki, sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ nu taj-kuŇč paŇčaŇčan ańßan "sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ nu kakar~…ĺajan". imańßini u ti- ¶iw ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺaj u ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ ku aŇčaŇčan maka r~…ĺabu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu sakatur~…ĺu nu mu ¶ir~…ĺir~…ĺaj a buna ¶, u r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad r~…ĺa…ôd nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ ***,***,*** kuŇč-r~…ĺi "tuŇčusaj tu ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad", imańßini kakar~…ĺajanaj matin…ôŇč tu uijni ¶a ¶aj dada Ē~ ° nu mauzipaj nu kakar~…ĺajan. ti- ¶iw a tuud pakar~…ĺ tu *.******* a daduj paŇčkiw nu mur~…ĺu pakar~…ĺa tu *,*** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, u r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kaz…ôk…ôt *.*g/ ¶m*, u satar~…ĺakawaj a ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺan bu ¶a ¶an. namańßini ti- ¶iw u r~…ĺin…ôŇč atu mar~…ĺin…ôŇč, pasasizuma tu d…ômiad r~…ĺabii atu s…ôpat a puu Ē~ ° makatutaj masumasumad, ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad manijur~…ĺ ku ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺipaj, ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan manijur~…ĺ tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺipaj ku ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a nikar~…ĺin…ôŇč paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ t…ôr~…ĺ…ôkr~…ĺar~…ĺ, ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kar~…ĺin…ôŇč paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a zazan, tusa a kaka ¶ajat zajńßan matik…ônińß ku nijur~…ĺ ma…ômi ¶ ku kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj t…ôr~…ĺ…ôkr~…ĺan, ti- ¶iwaj ujza dada Ē~ ° ku tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a imian, matu ¶…ôk nu sar~…ĺ…ônu a wij-sin-j…ô- ¶iw, zuma iza ńß…ônaj ku pituaj matin…ôŇč tu mir~…ĺakuit tu adidi Ē~ °aj nu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a buna ¶ zajńßan ¶a ¶aj a pir~…ĺipajan ku kanijur~…ĺ masur~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu ti- ¶iw satu mapar~…ĺa wijd-sin ńßan. i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu kakar~…ĺajan nu tin-w…ôn-sj…ô a kasa ¶iit, mi ¶ar~…ĺap tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu kakar~…ĺajan a masauŇčaj atu mir~…ĺir~…ĺid, mi ¶ukajmas tu kaga, mi ¶ud…ôkaj sa u niw-tun-r~…ĺi-sj…ô, migiŇčkiwaj tu kakar~…ĺajanaj i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a undu atu kasańßiza. u sagiŇčkiwan sa r~…ĺabuaj nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ a kakar~…ĺajan atu ¶ajaj kakatuudaj a tad…ômaw a ńß…ôn-sinan. u niw-tun, r~…ĺa-k…ô-r~…ĺaŇč-z…ô atu pabar~…ĺuŇčaaj a sakakawawan mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu ma ¶akat, sitat…ôŇčir~…ĺ a sinaik…ôsan tu ku nigiŇčkiwaj a masakapańßaj tu mar~…ĺ…ôpun. i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu kakar~…ĺajan par~…ĺa…ôn…ôm…ôn ku mańßiniaj , u s…ô-tuŇč-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun, nipiasip, tin-sin-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun, tin-w…ôn-sja, tin-ti atu nijur~…ĺ r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun, kajadańß nu mundaj "r~…ĺar~…ĺabu izaw ku tusa a bundaj". tin-ti-r~…ĺi-sj…ô mikitadu tu nisur~…ĺitan tu kujumin nu kakar~…ĺajan, **** a mińß ¶aan-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun maazińß ku ńßsj-waŇč-sin u tuŇčusaj nu tin-ti-r~…ĺi-sj…ô par~…ĺańßadaj a ba ¶u Ē~ °. tin-ti-r~…ĺi-sj…ô u kańß…ôm…ôkan a nar~…ĺ…ôkuan sa ujza par~…ĺańßad tut aj-kuŇč-tiŇč-r~…ĺi-sj…ô, migiŇčkuj atu par~…ĺańßad patańßkar~…ĺ tu ¶ana ¶anan nu tad…ômawaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an a zazan nu wi-sin. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == nilaculan == mubahelay i tay-kung Ś§™Á©ļť£õŤ°Ć sapibahel i tay-kung "kamu nu Ing, spacecraft", singangan aca tu sapicuu' nu taykung, atu balunga nu taykung, mubahelay balunga' nu taykung. u i likutay a bali nu ticiway a laed nu kakalayan, miduduc tu icelang nu kakalayan a misaungay ku canacan a sapibahel. sapibahel i tay-kung atu kakalayanay u cayay kalecad itini kapah kuwanen misumad ku saculil a zazan aca miala'. hinamaazihayay tu a sapibahel i tay-kung pasu nisanga'an nu tdemaw a wiy-sin, sapiazih nu taykung, tay-kung-sow atu cacanan a tay-kung-tcan. sapibahel nu tay-kung amileku tu zumaay a kawaw kanca aizaw ku sapiacingan, sapiculu', miditekay nu hikukiay, misupedan tu nisulitan, u kitizaan nu micukaymasay atu patatungus tu nisanga'n tu nialaan. anu maydih mitupin tu tademaw, asangaleb sinikelid tu sakataneknek nu uzip, sakakapah nu uzip, miazih ku tademaw tu miecaway a miedap tu zunbay nu miecaway. V2 silamalay acin tungusay u saayaway nu kitakitay sapibahel nu tay-kung. sapibahel i tay-kung duduc tanengay mitupin tu tademaw hakya pasazumaed sapibahel nu tay-kung atu mitupinay tu tademaw a sapibaheli I tay-kung, miculu'ay tu tademaw mubahel tayza i kakalayanan a sakacaw pangangan han tu "mitupinay tu tademaw a sapibahel nu tay-kung". mitupinay tu tademaw a sapibahel i tay-kung a yadah ku masazumaay a nisanga'an tu sapipazeng tu tuudan, ayaw amidiput tu kikayaw a tademaw atu balunga, amidungdunng tu akuti' atu kalat cilal nu kakalayan, atadeng mitena' tu bali ku balunga, akuti' cudet atu u huyakuy. mikawaway tu kikayay a tademaw atu mauzip i balunnga a silaed tu kakalayan, labu nu balung amisanga' tu sapawapen tu bali a sapihanhan. micumud tu kakalayan i likut nu hikuki mikawaw ayaw aizaw ku pabalian mala ku sakalaawan. nayay a tademaw a sapibahel i tay-kung duduc hakay misaliyuk tu ti-ciw malineng pala u nisanga' nu tademaw a wi-sin, atu sadiditek nu tay-kung. kilul tu sapibahel nu tay-kung u sapicukaymas atu nisanga'an, taneng henay atalaayaw mihapinang pasazuma tuhenian. sapibahel taneng amiliyas tu lala' lalid mubahelay a kikay, pasu i ti-ciw a labu nu bali mumahelay a sapibahel a hikuki "mahiniay u bali a mali, mubahelay abalunga, ce-sen-ci, hikukian amin", i hekalay a bali mubahelay a sapibahel i tay-kung "mahiniay nisanga'an nu tadedmaw a wi-sin, tay-kung-sow, mitupinay tu tademaw taykung balinga, taykung-can" atu canacanan nu silamalay acin atu mubahelay a lacu. i Zipun atu Caw-sin-pan-taw "sapibahel" a hikuki, sapibahel nu tay-kung pangangan ahan "sapibahel nu kakalayan". imahini u ti-ciw cilalay u cilal ku angangan maka labu hekalay nu sakatulu nu mucililay a bunac, u lecad laed nu cilal 149,597,870 kung-li "tungusay tu cacay a demiad", imahini kakalayanay matineng tu uiyni cacay dada' nu mauzipay nu kakalayan. ti-ciw a tuud pakal tu 5.97√ó1024 a daduy pangkiw nu mulu pakala tu 6,371 kung-li, u lecad nu kazeket 5.5g/cm3, u satalakaway a cilalan bucacan. namahini ti-ciw u lineng atu malineng, pasasizuma tu demiad labii atu sepat a puu' makatutay masumasumad, cacay a demiad maniyul ku cilal tu cacay a lipay, cacay a mihcaan maniyul tu cacay a lipay ku cilal, hekal a nikalineng pangangan han tu hekal teleklal, hekal a kalineng pangangan han tu kalawlaway hekal a zazan, tusa a kakacayat zayhan matikenih ku niyul maemic ku kalimucu' pangangan han tu kalawlaway teleklan, ti-ciway uyza dada' ku tatenga'ay a imian, matucek nu salenu a wiy-sin-ye-ciw, zuma iza henay ku pituay matineng tu milakuit tu adidi'ay nu muculilay a bunac zayhan cacay a pilipayan ku kaniyul masulecaday tu ti-ciw satu mapala wiyd-sin han. icelang nu kakalayan nu tin-wen-sye a kasaciit, micalap tu icelang nu kakalayan a masaungay atu mililid, micukaymas tu kaga, micudekay sa u niw-tun-li-sye, migingkiway tu kakalayanay icelang a undu atu kasahiza. u sagingkiwan sa labuay nu cilal a kakalayan atu cayay kakatuuday a tademaw a hen-sinan. u niw-tun, la-ke-lang-ze atu pabalungaay a sakakawawan malingatu tu macakat, sitatengil a sinaikesan tu ku nigingkiway a masakapahay tu malepun. icelang nu kakalayan palaenemen ku mahiniay , u se-tung-li-lun, nipiasip, tin-sin-li-lun, tin-wen-sya, tin-ti atu niyul li-lun, kayadah nu munday "lalabu izaw ku tusa a bunday". tin-ti-li-sye mikitadu tu nisulitan tu kuyumin nu kakalayan, 1846 a mihcaan-li-lun maazih ku hsy-wang-sin u tungusay nu tin-ti-li-sye palahaday a bacu'. Tin-ti-li-sye u kahemekan a nalekuan sa uyza palahad tut ay-kung-ting-li-sye, migingkuy atu palahad patahkal tu canacanan nu tademaway a nisanga'an a zazan nu wi-sin. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° nu tajkuŇč. u i r~…ĺikutaj a bar~…ĺi nu ti ¶iwaj a r~…ĺa…ôd nu kakar~…ĺajan, midudu ¶ tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu kakar~…ĺajan a misauŇčaj ku ¶ana ¶an a sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ. sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ i taj-kuŇč atu kakar~…ĺajanaj u ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad itini kapańß kuwan…ôn misumad ku sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a zazan a ¶a miar~…ĺa Ē~ °. ńßinamaazińßajaj tu a sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ i taj-kuŇč pasu ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °, midit…ôkaj nu ńßikukiaj, misup…ôdan tu nisur~…ĺitan, u kitizaan nu mi ¶ukajmasaj atu patatuŇčus tu nisaŇča Ē~ °n tu niar~…ĺaan. anu majdińß mitupin tu tad…ômaw, asaŇčar~…ĺ…ôb sinik…ôr~…ĺid tu sakatan…ôkn…ôk nu uzip, sakakapańß nu uzip, miazińß ku tad…ômaw tu mi…ô ¶awaj a mi…ôdap tu zunbaj nu mi…ô ¶awaj. ** sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a ¶in tuŇčusaj u saajawaj nu kitakitaj ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj tu tad…ômaw mubańß…ôr~…ĺ tajza i kakar~…ĺajanan a saka ¶aw paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "mitupinaj tu tad…ômaw a sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ nu taj-kuŇč". mitupinaj tu tad…ômaw a sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ i taj-kuŇč a sapawap…ôn tu bar~…ĺi a sapińßanńßan. mi ¶umud tu kakar~…ĺajan i r~…ĺikut nu ńßikuki mikawaw ajaw aizaw ku pabar~…ĺian mar~…ĺa ku sakar~…ĺaawan. najaj a tad…ômaw a sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ i taj-kuŇč dudu ¶
